steps.t: Nardol Quarry is located in south-western Taur Drúadan. You should investigate Nardol Quarry.
Enemies and the source of these Dheghûn can be found at Nardol Quarry. You should defeat foes and explore Nardol Quarry.
Rhûd-pulo-Drât can be found in Nardol Quarry. You should speak with Rhûd-pulo-Drât.
